name: vscode-html-wysiwyg
description: Click-to-edit WYSIWYG preview for static HTML files with byte-perfect source preservation.

commands.title: HTML WYSIWYG: Edit Templated File Anyway

htmlWysiwyg.port.markdownDescription: HTTP server port. Use `"auto"` to allocate an ephemeral port, or a specific port number.

htmlWysiwyg.editableElements.description: Override block-container selector list. Empty = use computed defaults.

htmlWysiwyg.templateTokens.description: Regex source patterns marking the whole file as templated. JS template-literal `${...}` interpolations are always handled at the per-text-node level and don't lock the file.

htmlWysiwyg.serverIdleTimeout.description: Milliseconds to keep the preview server alive after the last preview closes.

htmlWysiwyg.reloadDebounceMs.description: Debounce window (ms) for external-edit reload triggers.

htmlWysiwyg.openOnHtmlOpen.description: Automatically open the preview when an HTML file is opened.

htmlWysiwyg.aiCommand.description: Command id to invoke for "Rewrite with AI" (Phase 3A). Empty = auto-detect at activation.

scripts.typecheck: tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p tsconfig.iframe.json --noEmit && tsc -p tsconfig.webview.json --noEmit && tsc -p tsconfig.tests.json --noEmit
